시편 66:1.content: Make a joyful shout to God, all the earth!

시편 66:2.content: Sing to the glory of his name! Offer glory and praise!

시편 66:3.content: Tell God, “How awesome are your deeds! Through the greatness of your power, your enemies submit themselves to you.

시편 66:4.content: All the earth will worship you, and will sing to you; they will sing to your name.”

시편 66:5.content: Come, and see God’s deeds— awesome work on behalf of the children of men.

시편 66:6.content: He turned the sea into dry land. They went through the river on foot. There, we rejoiced in him.

시편 66:7.content: He rules by his might forever. His eyes watch the nations. Don’t let the rebellious rise up against him.

시편 66:8.content: Praise our God, you peoples! Make the sound of his praise heard,

시편 66:9.content: who preserves our life among the living, and doesn’t allow our feet to be moved.

시편 66:10.content: For you, God, have tested us. You have refined us, as silver is refined.

시편 66:11.content: You brought us into prison. You laid a burden on our backs.

시편 66:12.content: You allowed men to ride over our heads. We went through fire and through water, but you brought us to the place of abundance.

시편 66:13.content: I will come into your temple with burnt offerings. I will pay my vows to you,

시편 66:14.content: which my lips promised, and my mouth spoke, when I was in distress.

시편 66:15.content: I will offer to you burnt offerings of fat animals, with the offering of rams, I will offer bulls with goats.

시편 66:16.content: Come and hear, all you who fear God. I will declare what he has done for my soul.

시편 66:17.content: I cried to him with my mouth. He was extolled with my tongue.

시편 66:18.content: If I cherished sin in my heart, the Lord wouldn’t have listened.

시편 66:19.content: But most certainly, God has listened. He has heard the voice of my prayer.

시편 66:20.content: Blessed be God, who has not turned away my prayer, nor his loving kindness from me.
